title: BAY CITIES BROKERAGE - 211info
text: ADVANCED HEALTH BAY CITIES BROKERAGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides non-emergency transportation. Transportation can be scheduled to and from covered medical appointments and for pharmacy pickups. Transportation services are intended to help when no other options are available. Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Advanced Health Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 266-4323 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 266-4323 Toll-free (877) 324-8109 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule a ride up to 30 days in advance. Next-day rides must be scheduled by 4pm the day before. Trips longer than 70 miles need 2 business days' notice. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Name of patient, phone number, date of birth, date and time of appointment, pickup and dropoff address and phone number, medical provider's name, and name of who the appointment is with LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Coos and Curry Counties Services: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
